# v0.6 Restructure — Preconditions & Agent Zero

## Preconditions (must be true before dispatching A/B/C)

1. **Agent 1's uncommitted work lands or is reverted.** As of inspection,
   HEAD is `e54d9129dd` and ~80 files are uncommitted in
   `vyre-core/src/**`. `cargo build -p vyre --no-default-features` fails
   with 17 errors (missing `OpSpec`, `Compose`, `WgslOp`). The
   restructure cannot layer on a broken base. Either:
   - User resumes Agent 1 and lets it finish (preferred), OR
   - User reverts the uncommitted changes (`git checkout -- .` inside
     `libs/performance/matching/vyre/`) and we restart from the last
     green commit, OR
   - A human finishes the OpSpec/Compose removal manually so workspace
     is green.

2. **Workspace builds green.** `cargo build -p vyre --no-default-features`
   exits 0. All tests in vyre-core + vyre-wgpu + vyre-reference +
   conform/* pass. Layer-gate script not yet required; all legacy gates
   (check_trait_freeze, check_no_string_wgsl, etc.) must be in the same
   state as before the restructure began — no new red gates.

3. **Frozen contracts locked.** The following types are pinned during
   the restructure; no field additions / renames / reorderings:
   - `Expr`, `ExprNode`, `Ident`, `Node`, `NodeExtension`, `Program`
   - `BufferDecl`, `CacheLocality`, `MemoryHints`, `MemoryKind`
   - `DataType`, `BinOp`, `UnOp`, `AtomicOp`, `BufferAccess`, `Convention`
   - `OpSignature`, `OpId`, `ArenaProgram`, `ExprArena`, `ExprRef`
   - `AlgebraicLaw`, `IntrinsicDescriptor`
   - `VyreBackend`, `BackendError`, `BackendRegistration`, `DispatchConfig`
   - `CompiledPipeline`, `Memory`, `MemoryRef`
   - Wire format v1 byte layout
   
   Signature drift during the restructure breaks every downstream
   consumer. CI gate `check_trait_freeze.sh` must be green at every
   commit.

4. **`vyre-core` consumer list frozen.** Surgec, pyrograph, warpscan,
   and any other crate that imports from `vyre::*` continues to do so.
   The `vyre` crate remains a back-compat facade through v0.6.

## Agent Zero — the setup commit

Runs once, sequentially, before A/B/C dispatch.

### Changes (single commit)

1. **Create `vyre-foundation/`** with:
   - `vyre-foundation/Cargo.toml`:
     ```toml
     [package]
     name = "vyre-foundation"
     version = "0.0.1"
     edition.workspace = true
     rust-version.workspace = true
     license.workspace = true
     authors.workspace = true
     repository.workspace = true
     homepage.workspace = true
     description = "Foundation layer: IR, type system, memory model, wire format. Zero application semantics."
     publish = false  # flipped to true at v0.6.0 tag
     
     [dependencies]
     vyre-spec.workspace = true
     vyre-macros.workspace = true
     serde.workspace = true
     serde_json.workspace = true
     thiserror.workspace = true
     tracing.workspace = true
     rustc-hash.workspace = true
     smallvec.workspace = true
     blake3.workspace = true
     bytemuck.workspace = true
     inventory.workspace = true
     
     [lints]
     workspace = true
     ```
   - `vyre-foundation/src/lib.rs`:
     ```rust
     //! vyre-foundation — IR, type system, memory model, wire format.
     //!
     //! This crate contains zero application semantics. It is the hardware-
     //! neutral compiler foundation that every other vyre crate depends on.
     //! See `COMPUTE_2_0.md` for the layering rule.
     ```

2. **Create `vyre-driver/`** with:
   - `vyre-driver/Cargo.toml`:
     ```toml
     [package]
     name = "vyre-driver"
     version = "0.0.1"
     edition.workspace = true
     rust-version.workspace = true
     license.workspace = true
     authors.workspace = true
     repository.workspace = true
     homepage.workspace = true
     description = "Driver layer: registry, runtime, pipeline, routing, diagnostics. Substrate-agnostic backend machinery."
     publish = false
     
     [dependencies]
     vyre-foundation = { version = "0.0.1", path = "../vyre-foundation" }
     vyre-spec.workspace = true
     vyre-macros.workspace = true
     serde.workspace = true
     serde_json.workspace = true
     thiserror.workspace = true
     tracing.workspace = true
     rustc-hash.workspace = true
     smallvec.workspace = true
     blake3.workspace = true
     bytemuck.workspace = true
     inventory.workspace = true
     toml.workspace = true
     naga.workspace = true
     
     [lints]
     workspace = true
     ```
   - `vyre-driver/src/lib.rs`:
     ```rust
     //! vyre-driver — substrate-agnostic backend machinery.
     //!
     //! Registry, runtime, pipeline, routing, diagnostics, and the
     //! VyreBackend trait. Backend-specific crates (vyre-driver-wgpu,
     //! vyre-driver-spirv) depend on this and contribute lowerings.
     ```

3. **Create `vyre-ops/`** with:
   - `vyre-ops/Cargo.toml`:
     ```toml
     [package]
     name = "vyre-ops"
     version = "0.0.1"
     edition.workspace = true
     rust-version.workspace = true
     license.workspace = true
     authors.workspace = true
     repository.workspace = true
     homepage.workspace = true
     description = "Ops layer: dialects and algorithms (pattern, hash, crypto, compression, security, workgroup, etc.) — feature-gated."
     publish = false
     
     [dependencies]
     vyre-foundation = { version = "0.0.1", path = "../vyre-foundation" }
     vyre-driver = { version = "0.0.1", path = "../vyre-driver" }
     vyre-spec.workspace = true
     vyre-macros.workspace = true
     serde.workspace = true
     serde_json.workspace = true
     thiserror.workspace = true
     tracing.workspace = true
     rustc-hash.workspace = true
     smallvec.workspace = true
     blake3.workspace = true
     bytemuck.workspace = true
     inventory.workspace = true
     toml.workspace = true
     
     [features]
     default = ["all"]
     all = ["logical","math","hash","string","pattern","crypto","compression","graph","workgroup","security","stats","wgsl-byte","buffer","data-movement","reductions","scan","sort","cooperative","rule","fixtures","primitive","decode","encode","string-similarity","match-ops"]
     logical = []
     math = []
     hash = []
     string = []
     pattern = []
     crypto = []
     compression = []
     graph = []
     workgroup = []
     security = []
     stats = []
     wgsl-byte = []
     buffer = []
     data-movement = []
     reductions = []
     scan = []
     sort = []
     cooperative = []
     rule = []
     fixtures = []
     primitive = []
     decode = []
     encode = []
     string-similarity = []
     match-ops = []
     
     [lints]
     workspace = true
     ```
   - `vyre-ops/src/lib.rs`:
     ```rust
     //! vyre-ops — dialects and algorithms.
     //!
     //! Feature-gated collection of the standard op library: pattern matching,
     //! hashing, crypto, compression, security detection, workgroup primitives,
     //! and more. Each feature module registers OpDefs with vyre-driver's
     //! global registry at link time via `inventory::submit!`.
     ```

4. **Edit `Cargo.toml` (workspace root):**
   - Add to `[workspace] members`:
     ```
     "vyre-foundation",
     "vyre-driver",
     "vyre-ops",
     ```
   - Add to `[workspace.dependencies]`:
     ```
     vyre-foundation = { version = "0.0.1", path = "vyre-foundation" }
     vyre-driver = { version = "0.0.1", path = "vyre-driver" }
     vyre-ops = { version = "0.0.1", path = "vyre-ops" }
     ```

5. **Do NOT edit `vyre-core/Cargo.toml` or `vyre-core/src/lib.rs`.** Those
   edits happen during A/B/C agents' moves — each agent adds its own
   re-exports as it populates its crate.

### Gate

`cargo build` on the full workspace succeeds. The three new crates are
empty stubs that compile to empty dylibs. No existing behavior changes.

### Commit message

```
vyre §0: create vyre-foundation, vyre-driver, vyre-ops scaffolding

Empty stubs with Cargo.toml + lib.rs only. Added to workspace members
and workspace.dependencies. vyre-core untouched — agents A/B/C populate
these crates and add re-exports to vyre-core/lib.rs as they go.

Prereq for the v0.6 restructure per .internals/planning/COMPUTE_2_0.md.
```

## After Agent Zero

Fire Agent A + Agent B + Agent C via `batch_dispatch` in one call, each
with its corresponding plan document from `.internals/plans/v0.6-*.md`.
Each agent owns a disjoint file set. None waits for another.

After all three land and their commits are on `main`, run Agent Omega
(cleanup) to:
- Run the full `cargo build` on every workspace member
- Verify all existing tests pass
- Verify `scripts/check_trait_freeze.sh` is green
- Create `scripts/check_layering.sh` and wire into CI
- Reduce `vyre-core/src/` to just `lib.rs` (all other files should have
  been moved by A/B/C; Omega confirms and deletes empty directories)
- Update CHANGELOGs for every touched crate
- Tag `v0.6.0`
